exported_functions.name: BuildSummary
exported_functions.notes: EvaluatedRules is len(evaluation.OrderedRuleNames). ConflictCount increments for RejectionReasonLostTieBreak. LowConfidenceCount increments for RejectionReasonLowConfidence. Provisional candidates are not counted in Admitted or Rejected.

telemetry: none — pure data; callers attach telemetry
notes: Root package does NOT orchestrate evaluation. Evaluation entry point is engine.Evaluate.
BuildSummary counts EvaluatedRules as len(evaluation.OrderedRuleNames), not the raw pack rule count.
A single candidate can contribute to both LowConfidenceCount and ConflictCount if it carries both rejection reasons.
CandidateStateProvisional candidates are neither Admitted nor Rejected in summary counters.
